2606.12217.title: Making Foresight Actionable: Repurposing Representation Alignment in World Action Models
2606.12217.paper_summary: World Action Models (WAMs) offer a promising route for robot manipulation by using video generation models to model future scene evolution before producing control actions. However, our empirical observations reveal a phenomenon: generating plausible visual futures does not always guarantee the extraction of accurate actions. To diagnose this failure, we conduct action-head attention analysis and causal interventions. We find that the action decoder fails to focus on task-relevant interaction regions and remains sensitive to perturbations in task-irrelevant areas. This reveals a representation mismatch: hidden states optimized for visual reconstruction are not inherently organized in a form useful for low-level action control. In this paper, we propose AGRA, an Action-Grounded Representation Alignment objective that regularizes the world-action interface by aligning intermediate video diffusion features with spatially coherent semantic representations from a foundation visual encoder. We evaluate AGRA on real-world manipulation tasks. Experiments show that AGRA makes world model representations more action-grounded: by focusing the action decoder on the correct interaction regions, it improves object localization accuracy and affordance understanding, and makes the policy more robust to perturbations in task-irrelevant regions. As a result, AGRA consistently improves both in-distribution performance and out-of-distribution generalization over the baseline world action model.
2606.12217.paper_summary_zh: 世界行動模型（WAMs）提供了一條有前景的機器人操作路徑，通過使用視頻生成模型來模擬未來場景的演變，然後產生控制行動。<lb/>然而，我們的實證觀察揭示了一種現象：生成可信的視覺未來並不總是保證能夠提取準確的行動。<lb/>為了診斷這一失敗，我們進行了行動頭注意力分析和因果干預。<lb/>我們發現行動解碼器未能專注於與任務相關的互動區域，並對與任務無關的區域的擾動保持敏感。<lb/>這揭示了一種表示不匹配：為視覺重建優化的隱藏狀態並不天然以有助於低級行動控制的形式組織。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了AGRA，一種行動基礎表示對齊目標，通過將中間視頻擴散特徵與來自基礎視覺編碼器的空間一致語義表示對齊，來正則化世界-行動界面。<lb/>我們在現實世界的操作任務上評估AGRA。<lb/>實驗表明，AGRA使世界模型表示更具行動基礎性：通過將行動解碼器集中於正確的互動區域，它提高了物體定位的準確性和可供性理解，並使政策對與任務無關區域的擾動更加穩健。<lb/>因此，AGRA在基準世界行動模型上持續改善了分佈內性能和分佈外泛化。
2606.12217.author: Lu Qiu et.al.
2606.12217.authors: Lu Qiu, Yizhuo Li, Yi Chen, Yuying Ge, Yixiao Ge, Xihui Liu
